subcodes.first_line: O thou distinguished personage, thou seeker after truth! Thy letter of 4 April 1921, hath been read with love. The existence of the Divine Being
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حقیقتجو شخص محترم نامه که بتاریخ چهارم آپریل ۱۹۲۱ بود رسید و بکمال محبت
subcodes.subjects: @law of cause and effect, @the lower is unable to comprehend the higher, @Manifestation of God as mirror, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @one universal law; attractive power of love, @higher encompasses the lower, @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being
